crime.value: Murder by supernatural doll bite to the neck at midnight on victim's birthday
crime.quote: Alice made a swift bite to Mary's neck, jumped off Mary, put her hand over where Mary's heart should be

victim.value: Mary, a 6-year-old girl who turned six on January 13th, 1886, making her 'killable' due to matching the doll's finger count
victim.quote: Best of all, she has her hands in the shape of the number six! I'm turning six tommorow!

closed_world.value: Mary's bedroom during the night, with the doll as the only possible perpetrator present
closed_world.quote: Mary was fast asleep, dreaming of the presents that she would receive. Alice, her doll, blinked.

culprit_and_motive.value: Alice the supernatural doll, motivated by an evil nature that compels her to kill children matching her finger count annually
culprit_and_motive.quote: she was definitly not alive for a good cause, but for death, and not her death, but anothers.

red_herring.value: Initial misdirection toward human perpetrator through conventional murder scene staging
red_herring.quote: Mary's mother, who cried out: 'Mary! Oh, my darling, daughter! Who did this to you?'

clue_fairness.value: Six-finger detail presented as birthday significance before revealing its true meaning as age-targeting mechanism
clue_fairness.quote: Best of all, she has her hands in the shape of the number six! I'm turning six tommorow!

social_world.value: Victorian-era child vulnerability within domestic/commercial power structures
social_world.quote: Mary peered through the glass of her favourite shop, Tracy and Pods

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical transformation evidence - pulse monitoring and progressive finger accumulation per victim age
reveal_mechanic.quote: Seventy bpm, the normal pulse rate, fifty bpm, thirty bpm, ten bpm, and then... zero.

media_and_audience.value: Folkloric framing as cautionary tale with direct reader address as potential victim
media_and_audience.quote: The main question is: Where is Alice, when will she strike next, and... Are you her next victim?

_meta.title: ebook quailycat the six fingered doll
